title: Khabarovsk, Khabarovsk Krai — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Khabarovsk, Khabarovsk Krai: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Khabarovsk is a city in Khabarovsk Krai with a population of 610,000. A major Far Eastern city on the Amur River, the administrative center of the Russian Far East with a strategic location near China.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
